signatureMove.name: Cockatrice Stare
signatureMove.extraText: This may deal Dmg to characters outside this character's Melee Range.
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of melee, they must discard 1 energy.

abilities.name: The Faculty
abilities.description: If Old Polly, Prof Boffinsworth & Flinders Memphis are seen in this troupe at the start of the game, this character gains Rogue, Animal & Machine keywords.

abilities.name: Prognostication
abilities.description: Friendly Rogues within 4" gain [Seen It All Before: If this character is attacker or defender in a round of melee, before each player selects their Melee Card, your opponent must reveal their hand].

abilities.name: Wily Old Weasel
abilities.description: If a friendly Rogue takes an Arcane action within 6" you may reduce the energy cost by -1. Once per turn.

abilities.name: Cockatrice Companion
abilities.description: When this character targets an enemy that has no energy with a Melee Attack or Petrifying Gaze action, increase any Dmg dealt by +1.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Target suffers X Magical Dmg then loses X energy.
